conditions.description: Activities are expected to start at TRL 2 and achieve TRL 5 by the end of the project.

Participation is limited to legal entities established in EU Member States, Iceland, Norway, and the following associated countries: Canada, Israel, Republic of Korea, New Zealand, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom.
Entities controlled by non-eligible countries may be excluded unless guarantees are provided.
Maximum EU contribution per project is €19,000,000 (both minimum and maximum contribution are set at €19,000,000).
Indicative total topic budget is €38,000,000, with an indicative number of 2 funded projects.
Financial support to third parties (FSTP) is permitted with the following limits: maximum €300,000 per grant (stage 2), maximum €2,250,000 per grant (stage 3), and maximum €2,550,000 per third party.
This topic implements the co-programmed European Partnership on AI, Data and Robotics (ADRA); proposals must participate in the ADRA co-programme.
Communicable results must be made available via the AI-on-demand platform, constituting an open access dissemination obligation.
Maximum project duration is 48 months (standard maximum for large RIA actions under Horizon Europe; not explicitly stated in the topic text).
conditions.assumption_note: The 48-month maximum duration is not explicitly stated in the topic text of either source file. The value is carried from selected_call.json which includes an explicit note: 'Max project duration not explicitly stated in the topic text; 48 months is the standard maximum for large RIA actions under Horizon Europe. Verify against General Annex B for the applicable instrument constraints.' This condition should be verified against Tier 1 normative framework before finalisation.

conditions.description: Minimum consortium composition: the topic text does not explicitly state minimum partner count or entity type requirements beyond geographic eligibility. Standard Horizon Europe RIA minimum consortium rules (typically 3 independent legal entities from 3 different eligible countries) are expected to apply.
conditions.assumption_note: The call_entry.eligibility_conditions field in the slice is empty. The curated call extract does not specify minimum consortium size. The standard Horizon Europe RIA minimum consortium requirement (3 independent legal entities from 3 different Member States or associated countries) is a General Annex condition not reproduced in these topic-specific source files. This condition must be verified against Tier 1 normative framework documents (General Annexes) before downstream use.
